prompt:
{"type":"four-panel minimalist Chinese conceptual advice card set","format":"single 2x2 grid image containing 4 square cards, separated by thin white gutters, overall aspect ratio 1:1, refined editorial poster design","style":"high-end restrained clear conceptual cards, strong Chinese typography, smart negative space, warm off-white paper texture, subtle grain, muted black ink, graphite gray, stone blue accent, printmaking and collage feeling, minimal symbolic objects, poetic but readable, not decorative, not advertising-like","language":"Chinese visible text","layout":{"grid":"2 columns by 2 rows","card count":4,"cards":[{"position":"top left","main text":"{argument name="first card headline" default="慢思考，
快行动。"}","supporting text":"想清方向，
不在一时；
一旦确定，
就不要回头拖延。","visual concept":"a tiny solitary human figure standing on the edge of a dark rocky cliff, pale distant mountains in the lower background, a large faint off-white sun or moon disk behind the cliff, one thin diagonal line in the sky like a precise decision mark","composition":"large bold vertical Chinese headline on the upper left, small body copy below it, cliff occupying lower right, expansive blank sky","palette":"cream paper, black ink, charcoal rock, pale gray mountains"},{"position":"top right","main text":"{argument name="second card headline" default="把注意力
留给真正重要的。"}","supporting text":"你的精力有限，
不是所有事都值得
你全力以赴。","side labels":{"count":4,"labels":["选择",">","专注",">","深耕"]},"visual concept":"dark nearly black room with a small high window at the upper right casting a triangular beam of light down toward a circular spotlight on the floor, a single empty chair centered inside the circle","composition":"headline and body copy in the upper left, window and light beam upper right, spotlight and chair in lower center, vertical small navigation-like labels on the right edge","palette":"black charcoal background, warm cream typography, beige spotlight, soft dusty light"},{"position":"bottom left","main text":"{argument name="third card headline" default="允许
不确定，
也允许
慢慢来。"}","supporting text":"成长不是直线，
焦虑解决不了问题，
但耐心可以。","visual concept":"torn vertical paper edge running down the center-left like a canyon wall, a thin wandering black path line curving from bottom center to upper right, ending at a tiny tree near the top","composition":"large stacked Chinese headline on the left, small body copy near lower left, winding line and tree on the pale right side, strong paper tear texture","palette":"warm ivory paper, black text, beige torn-paper shadows, minimal ink line"},{"position":"bottom right","main text":"{argument name="fourth card headline" default="持续创造，
积累属于你的
复利。"}","supporting text":"每天一点点，
时间会给你
想要的答案。","footer labels":{"count":4,"labels":["记录","思考","输出","迭代"]},"visual concept":"stack of dark flat stone slabs rising from the lower right like accumulated layers, one rounded pebble balanced on top, a large muted blue-gray circle behind the stones suggesting a moon or abstract field","composition":"bold headline upper left with the final word in muted blue, small body copy below, footer words near bottom left separated by vertical bars, stone stack cropped at bottom right","palette":"cream paper, black ink, muted blue-gray accent, dark stone gray"}]},"typography":"bold Songti or Ming-style Chinese serif headline, high contrast strokes, smaller elegant Chinese serif body text, generous leading, precise alignment","texture":"visible paper grain, slight ink spread, soft vignette, tactile printed poster surface","negative prompt":"no photorealistic people close-up, no colorful gradients, no busy decorations, no extra panels, no logos, no English text, no generic motivational stock imagery"}
